name: 2'6"x4' Handloom Striped Woven Accent Rug Black/Gray - Room Essentials™: Entryway Rug, Indoor Use, Rug Pad Recommended
description:
Add timeless style to your floor with this Handloom Woven Accent Rug from Room Essentials™. The handmade accent rug is adorned with neutral-color stripes in black, gray, olive green and cream hues, adding flair to any indoor space. It's made from 100% miscellaneous scraps of undetermined fiber content and features a flat-pile height for versatile placement. Use it to highlight specific areas, such as in front of a reading chair or small desk, or keep it inside your entryway for a welcoming touch.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
